diary_entries.entry: Population: 19. Hydroponic crops show signs of blight. I spent the year on terraforming. Closest to Demeter.
Population: 19. Hydroponic crops show signs of blight. I spent the year on prayer. Closest to Vulcan-23.
Year 31 on Mars. Hydroponic crops show signs of blight. Morale is hopeful. We have 1245 food units left.

meta_awareness: Titan (year 31): 'The sub-simulations we run to model our governance... what if we are someone else's sub-simulation? What if our decisions are being evaluated from outside?'
